meta.title: Events
meta.intro: Events keep our Where Winds Meet community consistent: posted start times, clear goals, and friendly coordination without turning play into a chore.
badges: RSVP in Discord when planning is needed

featured.lead: Featured activities highlight the current guild focus, from welcoming new members to helping people prepare for harder content.
featured.title: Skill building & Mentoring
bullets: When open slots allow, we welcome new members while doing our best to make everyone feel at home in the Mōchirīī family.
Check Discord for final timing, requirements, and party assignments before the run.

upcoming.title: Guild Hero's Realm: Weekly Coordination
upcoming.summary: A relaxed coordination window for the guild hero's realm. Show up, ask questions & we'll do our best to match groups.

recurring.intro: Recurring activities happen as schedules allow. Discord carries the final timing each week, and the site summarizes the rhythm so members know what to watch for.

items.title: Sect dailies, guild activities, trials, hero realms, and more.
items.summary: Posted windows help members gather when possible, form full teams, and keep runs calm.

participation.title: How to participate
participation.body: All members are welcome. RSVP in Discord or the in-game guild event when planning is needed. Showing up on time helps leaders form balanced groups & keeps runs smooth for everyone.
